description: PR-mined: modeled after the real merged StreetComplete PR #6311 'fix: correct Vector3d division and subtraction operations' (2025-06-06), which fixed copy-paste bugs in Vector3d's div()/minus() operators (they referenced the wrong component). That fix is already baked into our pinned commit (div/minus already use x/y/z correctly), so a literal forward-patch of the PR's own diff is a no-op against this baseline. This edit continues the same 'make Vector3d's per-component operators complete' spirit by adding destructuring component1/2/3() operators.

expected.behavioralMarker: quick build reloaded Vector3d's destructuring operators
